title: My Home Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: My Home Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
My Home Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
